message:

export PATH=/nc/apps/bin:$PATH
nc_chipgen --version 2>&1 || /nc/apps/nc_chipgen --version 2>&1 || python3 /nc/apps/nc_chipgen --version 2>&1
echo "---"
ls /nc/apps/bin/ | head -30` executed with exit code 0.

usage: nc_chipgen [-h] --soc-config SOC_CONFIG --out OUT --pdk-root PDK_ROOT

                  [--padframe-gen-root PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT]
                  [--skip-synth | --full-synth] [--core-width CORE_WIDTH]
                  [--core-height CORE_HEIGHT] [--aspect-ratio ASPECT_RATIO]
                  [--target-util TARGET_UTIL]
nc_chipgen: error: the following arguments are required: --soc-config, --out/-o, --pdk-root
---
ipm

extras.command:
export NC_LIB_ROOT=/nc/apps
export PATH=/nc/apps/bin:$PATH
